name: CLX - MGA Insurance Commission Payout Batch v1

nodes.name: Schedule Trigger (DEACTIVATED)
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Monthly on 15th at 06:00 UTC. Aggregates all commission_ledger rows WHERE vertical_id='insurance' AND payout_status='pending' from the previous month. Generates per-advisor + per-MGA-principal summary, marks rows payout_status='processing', emits CSV-friendly summary in admin_action_log for Mary to execute the bank transfers manually (Phase 5 MVP). Phase 6 wires to actual payment rail.

parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const since = new Date(Date.now() - 45*24*3600*1000).toISOString(); return 'https://zqwatouqmqgkmaslydbr.supabase.co/rest/v1/commission_ledger?vertical_id=eq.insurance&payout_status=eq.pending&created_at=gte.' + encodeURIComponent(since) + '&order=advisor_id.asc&limit=10000&select=*'; })() }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ admin_user: 'crystallux-mga-payout-batch', action_type: 'vertical_generated', input_text: 'Insurance MGA monthly commission payout batch — ' + $json.count + ' ledger entries marked processing', panel_context: 'insurance_mga_payouts', generated_content: { count: $json.count, by_advisor: $json.by_advisor, by_principal: $json.by_principal, csv: $json.csv, vertical_id: 'insurance' }, result_summary: 'ok', success: true, created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

nodes.name: Log Summary
nodes.notes: Phase 5 MVP: CSV is placed into admin_action_log.generated_content for Mary to copy out and execute manually. Phase 6 wires to a payment-rail integration (Stripe Connect / Wise / etc.).
